subject: Hope all is well...and, that you got my message.
body:
I'm reachable in the office until 4:30pm and then by cell.  I'll be in a
meeting between 5pm and 7:30pm and then reachable after that.  Look forward
to catching up.
body_html: I'm reachable in the office until 4:30pm and then by cell.  I'll be in a meeting between 5pm and 7:30pm and then reachable after that.  Look forward to catching up.
